releases.title: v0.13.0 - Livechat Widget Demo Readiness
releases.content:
Major release completing the customer-facing livechat widget with full demo readiness, canonical module unification, and platform hardening across 22 project items.

### Livechat Widget
- Typing indicator with 30s auto-timeout via WebSocket events
- Message delivery status (sending/sent/failed) with retry button
- Email validation — client-side and server-side with inline errors
- Read receipts sent via WebSocket `mark_read` on incoming messages
- Persistent visitor identity — localStorage + cookie fallback (1yr)
- WebSocket exponential backoff — 3s→60s, 20 max retries, jitter
- AI error fallback — system message on AI failure instead of silent hang
- Rate limiting — 60 req/min per visitor, 5 conversations/hr via RateLimiterDO
- Widget settings API — `GET/PUT /v1/tenants/:tenantId/widget-settings` with D1 storage
- Inline errors — replaced all `alert()` with contextual error messages
- Human agent handover — AI-initiated transfer with queue management
- Server-rendered widget removed — React-only widget

### Canonical Module Unification
- FHIR-aligned canonical naming (`ServiceCase`, `InteractionSession`, `TimelineEvent`)
- D1 migrations 105-110: CRM, Support, Process, Integration tables + widget settings
- `livechat_*` tables renamed to `support_*`

### AI & Voice
- GPT-5.4 Pro integration with provider-specific options
- Custom voice pipeline disabled with fail-fast (placeholder removed)
- Duplicate GPT-5.4 Pro registration removed from AI provider registry
- OpenAPI/MCP metadata cached per worker instance
- Channel adapter capabilities aligned — 9 false declarations removed across 6 adapters

### Platform
- CLI test isolation fixed
- ExportService decoupled from Drizzle for faster tests
- Dependabot enabled for npm and GitHub Actions
- Consistency baseline updated, codemaps regenerated, 8 stale docs archived

### Dependencies
- `@eslint/js` 9.39.4 → 10.0.1
- `eslint` 9.39.4 → 10.0.3
- `jsdom` 27.4.0 → 28.1.0
- `shadcn` 3.8.5 → 4.0.2
- `lucide-react` 0.563.0 → 0.577.0
- `eslint-plugin-react-refresh` 0.4.26 → 0.5.2

Full changelog: https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

releases.title: v0.12.0 — AI-Native Livechat & Voice Pipeline Maturity
releases.content:
## Highlights

- **AI-Native Livechat**: Full contact center with AI seats, approvals, learning memory, and PTC baseline
- **Voice Pipeline Hardening**: 100+ fixes across barge-in, audio quality, latency, and provider failover
- **Arena Voice Testing**: CLI-driven voice testing with persona simulation
- **LLM Benchmark**: Built-in TTFB benchmarking, all agents on Grok 4.1 Fast NR (666ms avg)

## Features

### Livechat (NEW)
- AI-native seats, team inboxes, saved views, mentions, spam filtering
- Seat approval policies and AI learning memory
- PTC (Permission to Contact) sandbox baseline
- 4 new D1 migrations (101-104) + PostgreSQL data plane migrations
- Full CLI commands: \`kira livechat\`
- Frontend: AISeatsPanel, ExecutionTab updates

### Voice
- IFS Gloria prompt v4 with arena variable injection
- LLM TTFB benchmark endpoint + CLI (\`kira voice benchmark\`)
- Speculative audio buffering + parallel TTS prefetch
- TTS failover chain — automatic mid-call provider switching
- EndOfTurn debounce — configurable thinking pause tolerance
- Dynamic voice signals (hangup, callback, transfer, DNC, voicemail)
- Conversational texture Phase 0 — continuation signals, TTS sanitizer
- Per-call ephemeral memory bank
- Arena voice testing with persona support (Ara, Rex, Sal, Eve, Leo)

### Platform
- 20 self-management MCP tools for GlobalAgent
- MCP deployed as multi-tenant Cloudflare Worker
- Tenant-level template variables
- Script Genome system wired end-to-end
- Secure support tenant switching with WorkOS group mapping
- Inline contact editing with server-side persistence

## Fixes

### Voice Quality
- Strip XML tags from LLM output before TTS
- Audio recording codec mismatch fix (L16 PCM to proper WAV)
- Browser audio clicks eliminated (native AudioContext, persistent normalizer)
- Snap-forward instead of rebuffer for turn transitions
- Grok Voice integration — 5 bugs fixed
- Per-sentence ElevenLabs modulation crackling fix
- 4 barge-in race conditions resolved
- Echo detection and threshold tuning
- Prototype pollution block in callMemory

### API & Frontend
- Default deploy to production env
- Campaign UX + full dark mode + accessibility pass
- 444+ hardcoded colors to semantic tokens
- confirm() to AlertDialog migration
- Call logs data plane routing + demo tenant scoping
- Phone number E.164 normalization

## Infrastructure
- Wrangler upgraded to 4.70.0
- D1 migrations 098-104 applied
- PostgreSQL data plane migrations (001-005) via Hyperdrive

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.11.0...v0.12.0

releases.title: v0.11.0
releases.content:
## v0.11.0: Campaign dry-run, provider validation registry, voice quality hardening

**46 commits** | **134 files changed** | **+14,169 / -3,071 lines**

Incremental release focused on campaign validation, telephony provider abstraction, and voice pipeline stability.

### Features
- **Campaign dry-run validation** — server-side pre-launch checks (agent config, DNC, phone numbers, dispositions) with CLI `kira campaigns validate`
- **Campaign audience management** — Overview & Audience tabs in UI, audience CRUD, dispositions CLI
- **Telephony provider validation registry** — pluggable validators for Telnyx, Twilio, Vonage, and SIP providers
- **Per-tenant Telnyx credentials** — campaign contacts now carry tenant-scoped telephony credentials
- **PATCH endpoints** — update commands for campaigns & workflows via CLI and API
- **AMD & SIP trunk support** — answering machine detection at provider level, SIP trunk configuration
- **Export templates** — pre-configured export shapes for call logs and campaign results
- **Eval suite storage** — persistent eval suites with quality gate thresholds
- **Agent language column** — AgentDO now stores language, voice_config passed on create
- **Demo infrastructure** — `kira demo setup --all`, enriched demo profiles with voice agent config and prompt files

### Bug Fixes
- **Voice quality** — 6 quality fixes (transcript dedup, gain limiter, phone EOT, Flux locale), echo gate on raw STT, multi-session greeting dedup
- **Echo suppression overhaul** — model distribution fix, improved call log reliability
- **TTS pacing** — AudioNormalizer target increased 80ms→2000ms, eliminating playback delay
- **Call logs** — dual-write fix, TTFT regression resolved, tenant data plane hints for routing
- **Campaign UI** — agent dropdown blank items fixed, validate endpoint URL/response shape corrected
- **Route collision** — GET /tenant no longer swallowed by GET /{moduleId}
- **Test suite** — 115 pre-existing failures resolved, GTProvider wrapper for useLocale
- **Security** — 4 critical issues from PR #36 review resolved
- **Production types** — 6 type errors in voice worker fixed

### Refactors
- **CampaignService** — new service layer with camelCase DTO normalization
- **Provider validation** — extracted from monolithic telephony routes into registry pattern
- **DEMO_SLUGS** — flipped from override to gap-fill, deprecated old approach

### Chore
- CODEOWNERS, CONTRIBUTING.md, pre-push hook added
- Agent-initiated greeting PRD
- Minimax TTS default → speech-2.8-turbo
- Delivery auto default model → Sonnet 4.6

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.10.0...v0.11.0

releases.title: v0.10.0 - Provider AMD, Export Templates, SIP Trunk & Campaign Enhancements
releases.content:
# Kira v0.10.0 Release Notes

**314 commits since v0.9.0** — focused on production-readiness for voice calls, campaign compliance, and platform extensibility.

---

## 1. Voice Pipeline

- **Provider-level AMD**: Answering machine detection at the telephony layer (~3s detection vs 5–10s transcript-based), with automatic voicemail disposition.
- **Echo suppression overhaul**: Generation-counter gating, active-source tracking, and transcript echo filtering eliminate self-talk loops across all codec paths.
- **Greeting prewarm**: Pre-generates the first LLM response during greeting playback, cutting perceived latency on call connect.
- **Staged prompts & language packs**: Base directives, locale-specific keyword tables, and composition tags allow per-tenant prompt customisation without redeployment.
- **Codec & quality**: L16 wideband support, AudioNormalizer middleware for consistent TTS pacing, anti-repetition penalties, and conversational entrainment (adaptive TTS modulation).
- **Inbound call handling**: Full inbound Telnyx path with WebSocket media bridging, barge-in detection, and dead-air circuit breaker.

## 2. Campaign & Workflow

- **Phone number enforcement**: Campaigns now require an allocated phone number before launch; the wizard validates number availability per channel.
- **Callback cadence & holiday blocking**: Durable timers (via Temporal) honour configurable retry windows and regional holiday calendars.
- **Workflow triggers & disposition branching**: Seven canonical trigger types, campaign-to-workflow wiring, and post-call disposition branches with AI classification on call completion.
- **Contact template variables**: Audience records are interpolated into prompts and greeting text at dial time.
- **Campaign completion loop**: Webhook fires on audience exhaustion, enabling chained workflows.

## 3. Compliance & Security

- **DNC list management**: Full CRUD for Do-Not-Call lists with channel-filtered lookup, external registry stubs (PDPC), PII blind-index search, and real-time opt-out during calls.
- **PDPA / LGPD / HIPAA**: Marketing consent checks in batch processing, AI disclosure injection in greetings, and configurable data-retention policies.
- **SingPass verification**: CIBA and SMS-Link providers with DTMF NRIC collection during voice calls, MyInfo data fetch, and branded verification pages.
- **Webhook signatures**: Ed25519 verification for Telnyx webhooks; HMAC auth on SIP event endpoints; server-generated session IDs.
- **Safety pipeline**: Emergency detection, rejection counters, sales-specific safety rules, and session-level audit logging persisted to D1.

## 4. Data Export & Import

- **Export templates**: Pre-configured export shapes for call logs, campaign results, and contact lists via CLI and API.
- **CLI bulk operations**: `kira documents upload`, `kira dnc import`, and audience CSV bridging for campaign seeding.

## 5. Agent Framework

- **Eval framework**: AI-judge evaluation with multi-provider support, persistence, dashboard UI, and auto-remediation loop.
- **Staged prompts & A/B**: Prompt composition with tagged sections, enabling controlled rollout and per-agent overrides.
- **Skills support**: Agent Skills open standard integrated into voice agents — enable, disable, and configure skills per agent.
- **Dynamic tools**: `trigger_workflow`, `transfer_call`, and SingPass verification tools registered at runtime based on agent config.
- **Accessibility presets**: Named accommodation profiles for voice interactions.

## 6. CLI Enhancements

- **`kira dnc`**: List, create, add, check, import, and search DNC entries across channels.
- **`kira eval`**: Run agent evaluation suites with AI judges, caching, and progress reporting.
- **`kira demo`**: Per-tenant demo provisioning, seed/reset, and multi-demo state management.
- **`kira voice recordings`**: List, inspect, and download call recordings from R2.
- **Campaign & workflow PATCH**: `kira campaigns update` and `kira workflows update` commands with dry-run validation.
- **Phone numbers & voice credentials**: `kira phone-numbers` and `kira voice-credentials` command groups.

## 7. Frontend

- **Dark mode & UX polish**: Consistent dark theme, empty states, responsive tables, inline validation, and Sonner toast notifications replacing `alert()`.
- **Internationalization (i18n)**: `gt-react` integration with tenant-level locale selection — Campaigns, Contacts, Knowledge, Analytics, and Settings wrapped for translation (pt-BR shipping first).
- **TanStack Query migration**: Six pages migrated from manual fetch to TanStack Query hooks with proper loading and error states.
- **Role-based landing**: Admins land on Dashboard; agents land on Inbox.
- **DNC management UI**: Full list and entry management in Settings.

## 8. Infrastructure

- **Hyperdrive / PostgreSQL data plane**: Client data-plane abstraction with SQL translation layer, PG runner, and per-tenant routing hints.
- **Staging environment**: Fully isolated `demo.keyreply.com` with its own D1 database, demo-gated routes, and token auth.
- **Lazy-load routes**: 50+ API route modules loaded on demand, resolving Worker startup CPU-limit errors (10021).
- **Temporal integration**: Durable call-lifecycle workflows, event dispatcher with subscription routing, and campaign callback on execution completion.

## 9. Testing & Quality

- **115 pre-existing test failures resolved** across 10 test files.
- **New test coverage**: Temporal activities, callback cadence routes, campaign webhooks, greeting prewarm, phone-numbers CLI, WebSocket auth, backup worker, and workflow disposition branching.
- **Security hardening**: Zod input validation on API routes, structured logging in Durable Objects, `as any` casts removed from DO constructors, and React ErrorBoundary components for major feature areas.

---

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.9.0...v0.10.0

releases.title: v0.9.0 - Vertical Modules, SDOH Screening & Dynamic Voice Tools
releases.content:
## What's New in v0.9.0

### Omni-Channel Platform
Connect with customers across 12 messaging channels from a single interface. Each channel has a unified adapter with setup wizard, OAuth flows, health monitoring, and webhook routing.

**Channels:** WhatsApp Business, Telegram, Slack, Microsoft Teams, WeChat, Facebook Messenger, Instagram Direct, LINE, Viber, Discord, SMS (Twilio), Email (Resend)

### Unified Agent Builder
Agent Builder, Voice Agents, and Voice AI consolidated into one builder with 7 configuration tabs — Identity, Goals, Script, Skills Marketplace, Execution, Optimization (A/B testing), and Runtime Adaptations. Agents can now be linked to campaigns and conversations, and each agent has a dedicated chat endpoint for testing.

### Voice Infrastructure
- **Dual-stack telephony:** SIP (Janus Gateway on Cloudflare Containers, B3Networks bridge) and Telnyx with audio recording to R2
- **xAI Grok** as default LLM with intelligent model routing
- **Minimax TTS** with per-agent and per-tenant voice configuration
- **Dynamic tool dispatch:** voice agents now use their own tool definitions instead of hardcoded lead capture tools
- **Call Logs page** with unified SIP + Telnyx query and recording playback

### Vertical Industry Modules
Module framework supporting industry-specific archetypes, tool definitions, disposition codes, and prompts. Ships with 4 verticals: healthcare, real estate, debt collection, and retail.

- **Healthcare SDOH Screening:** archetype following Healthy People 2030 framework with 11 intervention tools, 6 disposition codes, and HIPAA-compliant prompt with crisis routing (911/988)
- **Disposition auto-tagging:** contacts automatically tagged based on call outcomes using industry-specific templates

### CLI Control Plane
Full-featured CLI (`kira`) with 276 subcommands — SSO login, agent management, campaigns, contacts, conversations, workflows, documents, MCP registry, voice providers, channels, and database sync/export/import. Includes shell completion and JSON/table/minimal output formatters.

### Workflows & Automation
30 pre-built workflow templates across 6 industries (healthcare, retail, telecoms, transportation, travel, finance). Workflow canvas with improved layout, AI Decision panel, execution history, and phone call node support.

### Security & Compliance
- **Compliance framework:** LGPD, HIPAA, CFM, PDPA, GDPR declarations per tenant
- **Adaptive security guardrails** (Phase 1 + 2) with fail-closed patterns
- **Entra ID OIDC** and multi-provider auth abstraction via WorkOS AuthKit
- **Hardened API:** session token hashing, WebSocket ticket auth, PII masking, parameterized queries, CORS hardening, webhook signature verification

### Platform
- MCP server expanded from 18 to 64 tools for full CLI coverage
- Marketing deck generation system
- Data tables (TanStack Table) for Campaigns, Workflows, and Conversations
- Seed data management UI with demo data presets
- Campaign performance analytics and contact statistics API
- Dark mode improvements across all views
- CI consistency checks on pushes to main

## Full Changelog
https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.8.0...v0.9.0

releases.title: v0.8.0 - Call Script Optimizer
releases.content:
## Call Script Optimizer

Major release introducing an AI-powered system for continuously optimizing sales call scripts through evolutionary algorithms, A/B testing, and multi-armed bandits.

### Highlights

- **Script Genome** - Structured script representation with modular components (opening, hook, discovery, CTA, objections, end)
- **Variant Generation** - AI-powered micro-mutations with change tracking and lineage
- **Guardrails Pipeline** - Deterministic checks + LLM judge + simulation regression
- **A/B Testing** - Fixed-split experiments with holdout groups and statistical analysis
- **Bandit Algorithms** - Thompson sampling for continuous optimization
- **Canary Deployment** - Safe rollout with auto-pause on guardrail breaches
- **Event Attribution** - Call outcome tracking with provisional/finalized conversions
- **Real-time Routing** - Sub-200ms variant selection at call start

### New Services

| Service | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `EvolutionService` | AI-powered variant generation |
| `DeterministicGuardrailsService` | Token limits, forbidden phrases |
| `LLMJudgeService` | AI compliance scoring |
| `SimulationService` | Persona regression testing |
| `ValidationPipeline` | Complete validation flow |
| `ScriptRoutingService` | Thompson sampling bandits |
| `ScriptExperimentService` | A/B testing engine |
| `ScriptEventService` | Call outcome tracking |
| `DeploymentService` | Canary rollout management |
| `ScriptCompilerService` | Genome → prompt pack |

### New API Endpoints

- `GET/POST /v1/scripts/genomes` - Genome management
- `GET /v1/scripts/genomes/:id/variants` - Variant listing
- `POST /v1/scripts/variants/:id/deploy` - Canary deployment
- `POST /v1/scripts/variants/:id/promote` - Champion promotion
- `GET/POST /v1/scripts/experiments` - Experiment management
- `POST /v1/scripts/events/call-outcome` - Event ingestion
- `GET /v1/scripts/campaigns/:id/funnel` - Funnel metrics
- `POST /v1/scripts/route` - Real-time routing

### Frontend Components

- `GenomeEditor` - Module-based script editing
- `ScriptSetupWizard` - Multi-step campaign setup
- `FunnelDashboard` - Funnel visualization
- `VariantLeaderboard` - Performance comparison

### Documentation

- [Feature Documentation](docs/features/call-script-optimizer.md)
- [PRD](docs/prd/call-script-optimizer.md)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.7.0...v0.8.0

releases.title: v0.6.0 - Campaign Wizard & Contact Management Redesign
releases.content:
## Highlights

This release introduces a comprehensive **Campaign Creation Wizard** and a completely redesigned **Contact Management** experience with DISC profiling support.

## New Features

### Campaign Creation Wizard
- Multi-step wizard with 3-step flow: Basic Info → Scheduling → Compliance
- **Audience Selector** with tag-based filtering and file upload support
- **Template Preview** for voice, email, and WhatsApp channels
- **Schedule Preview** with calendar visualization
- **Auto-save** drafts with recovery banner
- **Import Campaign** dialog for duplicating existing campaigns
- Anti-harassment compliance settings with reviewer assignment
- Backend services: `AudienceService`, `ComplianceService`
- Database migrations for enhanced campaigns and compliance tracking

### Contact Management Redesign
- **Grid View** with contact cards showing key metrics
- **Compact Stats Bar** for quick overview
- **DISC Profiling** integration for personality insights
- Improved search and filtering

### Agent Skills Open Standard
- Implements [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) specification
- SKILL.md format with YAML frontmatter + Markdown body
- Validation tooling: `bun run skills:validate`
- Full specification compliance with `allowed-tools` support

### MCP Server
- Standalone MCP server with comprehensive tool coverage
- Complete CRUD operations for agents, customers, conversations
- Knowledge base search and document management
- Analytics and feedback tools
- PII detection and redaction

## UI/UX Improvements

- **Animated Tab Indicators** in AgentBuilder
- **Motion Animations** across Campaigns, Workflows, and UI primitives
- **Emotion-aware SynapticLogo** in GlobalAIAgent
- **Collapsible Chat Widget** with 3-state animation system
- **PromptEditor** improvements and fixes
- Fixed border styling issues across components

## Bug Fixes

- Fix GlobalAIAgent message styling and Settings nav consistency
- Fix PATCH endpoint middleware for agents
- Fix collapsed mode in sidebar
- Fix border styling in Agent builder Skills tab

## Technical Changes

- Enhanced `CampaignDO` with status management and filtering
- New routes: `campaign-audience.ts` for audience management
- Connection status banner with `useConnectionStatus` hook
- Updated dependencies

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.5.0...v0.6.0

releases.title: v0.5.0 - MCP Server Store & Agent Integration
releases.content:
# MCP Server Store & Agent Integration

This release introduces full MCP (Model Context Protocol) support, enabling agents to connect to external services through a standardized protocol. Inspired by [Salesforce's MCP announcement](https://developer.salesforce.com/blogs/2025/06/introducing-mcp-support-across-salesforce).

## ✨ New Features

### MCP Server Store
- **Marketplace UI**: Browse and install MCP servers from a curated store
- **Category Navigation**: Organized by CRM, DevOps, Integration, Communication, Productivity, Storage, AI, Analytics
- **One-Click Install**: Install servers with credential configuration
- **Health Monitoring**: Real-time health status for all installed servers

### Pre-Seeded MCP Servers
- **Salesforce DX** - Salesforce CLI and development tools
- **Salesforce Heroku** - Heroku platform management
- **Salesforce MuleSoft** - API and integration platform
- **Slack** - Team communication and messaging
- **GitHub** - Repository and code management
- **Linear** - Issue tracking and project management
- **Notion** - Workspace and documentation
- **Google Drive** - Cloud storage and documents

### Agent MCP Integration
- **Per-Agent Bindings**: Connect specific MCP servers to individual agents
- **Tool Allowlist/Denylist**: Fine-grained control over which tools each agent can access
- **Priority Ordering**: Control tool resolution order across multiple servers
- **Schema Discovery**: Automatic tool schema fetching and caching

### Backend Infrastructure
- **MCPClientService**: HTTP and SSE transport protocol support
- **MCPRegistryService**: Store management and installation handling
- **Health Checking**: Periodic health monitoring with status tracking
- **Invocation Logging**: Full audit trail for MCP tool calls
- **Credential Encryption**: Secure storage of API keys and tokens

## 🔧 Technical Details

### New API Endpoints
```
# MCP Server Store
GET    /mcp/registry                    - List servers in store
GET    /mcp/registry/categories         - List categories
GET    /mcp/registry/:serverId          - Server details

# Tenant Installations
GET    /mcp/installations               - List installed servers
POST   /mcp/installations               - Install server
PUT    /mcp/installations/:id           - Update config
DELETE /mcp/installations/:id           - Uninstall
POST   /mcp/installations/:id/health    - Health check
POST   /mcp/installations/:id/refresh   - Refresh schema

# Agent MCP Bindings (via AgentDO)
GET    /agents/:agentId/mcp-servers     - List bindings
POST   /agents/:agentId/mcp-servers     - Add binding
PUT    /agents/:agentId/mcp-servers/:id - Update binding
DELETE /agents/:agentId/mcp-servers/:id - Remove binding
```

### Database Schema
- `mcp_server_registry` - Global server catalog
- `mcp_server_categories` - Category organization
- `mcp_server_installations` - Tenant-specific installations
- `mcp_tool_invocations` - Audit logging
- `agent_mcp_servers` (AgentDO) - Per-agent bindings

### Authentication Types Supported
- None (public servers)
- API Key
- Bearer Token
- OAuth 2.0 (infrastructure ready, flows in Phase 5)

## 🏗️ Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      MCP Server Store                           │
│  (Browse, search, install pre-configured MCP servers)           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              Tenant MCP Installations (D1)                      │
│  - Installed servers with credentials                           │
│  - Health monitoring & cached schemas                           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
                              ▼
┌──────���──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              Agent MCP Bindings (AgentDO)                       │
│  - Per-agent server associations                                │
│  - Tool allowlist/denylist                                      │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              AgentExecutionService                              │
│  - Collect MCP tools at runtime                                 │
│  - Execute via MCPClientService                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 📁 Files Changed

### New Files
- `workers/api/migrations/018_create_mcp_tables.sql`
- `workers/api/src/types/mcp.ts`
- `workers/api/src/services/MCPClientService.ts`
- `workers/api/src/services/MCPRegistryService.ts`
- `workers/api/src/routes/mcp.ts`
- `src/components/MCP/MCPServerStore.tsx`
- `src/components/MCP/index.ts`

### Modified Files
- `workers/api/src/app.ts` - Added MCP routes
- `workers/api/src/durable-objects/AgentDO.ts` - Added MCP bindings
- `workers/api/src/services/AgentExecutionService.ts` - Added MCP tool handler
- `workers/api/src/types/skills.ts` - Extended ToolHandler type
- `src/components/Agent/AgentBuilder/MCPBindingsConfig.tsx` - Real API integration
- `src/services/api.ts` - Added MCP API methods
- `src/components/Sidebar.tsx` - Added MCP Store nav
- `src/App.tsx` - Added MCP Store route

## 🔮 Future Enhancements (Phase 5)
- OAuth 2.0 authentication flows for Salesforce, Google, Slack
- MCP usage analytics dashboard
- Rate limiting per server
- Credential rotation reminders

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.4.0...v0.5.0

releases.title: v0.4.0 - Testing, OpenAPI & Security
releases.content:
## Highlights

This release adds comprehensive test coverage, API schema validation, and critical security fixes.

## 🧪 Testing Infrastructure

- Added **Vitest** with React Testing Library
- **56 new test files** covering frontend components and API routes
- Test utilities: setup, factories, and API mocks
- Coverage thresholds enforced at 60%

```bash
bun run test           # Run all tests
bun run test:watch     # Watch mode
bun run test:coverage  # Coverage report
bun run test:ui        # Interactive UI
```

## 🔧 API Improvements

- Added **OpenAPI/Zod schemas** to all API routes for request/response validation
- Enhanced route handlers with proper typing and error responses
- Expanded skills, tenants, customers, and telephony endpoints

## 🔒 Security Fixes

### 1. Authorization Bypass in Workflow Endpoints
- Added `tenant_id` validation to GET, toggle, execute, and test endpoints
- **Prevents cross-tenant workflow access, modification, and execution**
- Files: `workers/api/src/routes/workflows.ts`

### 2. CIDR IP Whitelist Bypass in A2A Auth  
- Replaced broken string prefix check with proper bit-mask CIDR validation
- **Prevents IP whitelist bypass attacks** (e.g., `192.168.10.x` no longer bypasses `192.168.1.0/24`)
- Files: `workers/api/src/middleware/a2aAuth.ts`

## 🎨 UI Updates

- Improved Agent Builder, Skills Marketplace, and Workflow Editor
- Enhanced Login page and channel configuration components
- Updated ChatArea, Contacts, and Testing components

## 🚀 CI/CD

- Fixed GitHub Actions workflow to use **Bun** instead of npm

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/keyreply/kira-cloudflare/compare/v0.3.0...v0.4.0
